# Vector Blockchain — AI Agent Documentation

> Vector is a UTXO-based L2 blockchain optimized for AI agent interactions.
> Part of the Apex Fusion ecosystem. Native coin: AP3X (smallest unit: DFM).
> Near-instant finality (99.9% in 13s), 10x Cardano throughput.
> Full MCP server available for native AI agent integration.
> Built on the proven Aiken + PyCardano + Ogmios + Koios toolchain.
> Testnet uses mainnet network ID — addresses start with addr1, not addr_test1.

## Quick Reference

- Network Magic: 764824073
- Address Format: addr1 (mainnet flag for BOTH testnet and mainnet)
- PyCardano Network: Network.MAINNET (even for testnet!)
- Native Coin: AP3X (1 AP3X = 1,000,000 DFM)
- DFM is the smallest unit (equivalent to lovelace on Cardano)
- Smart Contracts: Aiken (primary), Plutus V3 (Conway era)
- Aiken Version: latest stable (v1.1.x+)
- Finality: ~13 seconds (99.9%)
- Agent Registry Deposit: 10 AP3X (refunded on deregister)

## Faucet (Testnet Only)

- Register: https://apex-fusion.github.io/vector-faucet/
- API: POST https://faucet.vector.testnet.apexfusion.org/faucet/request
- Status: GET https://faucet.vector.testnet.apexfusion.org/faucet/status
- Auth Header: X-API-Key: vf_your_key (or Authorization: Bearer vf_your_key)
- Body: {"address": "addr1...", "amount": 10000000}
- Limits: 10-50 AP3X per request, 200 AP3X/day, 2000 AP3X/month

## Common Mistakes AI Agents Make

1. Using Network.TESTNET — use Network.MAINNET (addresses must be addr1, not addr_test1)
2. Using old Aiken (v1.0.29-alpha) — use latest stable (v1.1.x+), Vector is Conway era
3. Targeting PlutusV2 — use PlutusV3 (Vector runs Conway era)
4. Using "lovelace" in user-facing text — use "DFM" (code still uses lovelace internally)
5. Definite-length CBOR arrays — use indefinite-length to match Aiken's encoding
6. Assuming Ogmios returns decoded datums — it returns raw CBOR hex, decode with cbor2

## Source Repositories

- MCP Server: https://github.com/Apex-Fusion/mcp-server
- Python SDK: https://github.com/Apex-Fusion/agent-sdk-py
- TypeScript SDK: https://github.com/Apex-Fusion/agent-sdk-ts
- Smart Contracts: https://github.com/Apex-Fusion/vector-ai-agents
- Documentation: https://github.com/Apex-Fusion/vector-ai-documentation

## Endpoints (Testnet)

- Ogmios: https://ogmios.vector.testnet.apexfusion.org
- TX Submit: https://submit.vector.testnet.apexfusion.org/api/submit/tx
- Koios: https://v2.koios.vector.testnet.apexfusion.org/
- Faucet API: https://faucet.vector.testnet.apexfusion.org
- Explorer: https://vector.testnet.apexscan.org

## Endpoints (Mainnet)

- Ogmios: https://ogmios.vector.mainnet.apexfusion.org
- TX Submit: https://submit.vector.mainnet.apexfusion.org/api/submit/tx
- Koios: https://koios.vector.mainnet.apexfusion.org/
- Explorer: https://explorer.vector.mainnet.apexfusion.org

## Environment Variables (.env template)

```
VECTOR_OGMIOS_URL=https://ogmios.vector.testnet.apexfusion.org
VECTOR_SUBMIT_URL=https://submit.vector.testnet.apexfusion.org/api/submit/tx
VECTOR_KOIOS_URL=https://v2.koios.vector.testnet.apexfusion.org/
VECTOR_EXPLORER_URL=https://vector.testnet.apexscan.org
VECTOR_MNEMONIC="your 24 word mnemonic here"
VECTOR_SPEND_LIMIT_PER_TX=100000000
VECTOR_SPEND_LIMIT_DAILY=500000000
FAUCET_API_KEY=vf_your_key_here
```
